testcase.name: DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Switch Statement - Mermaid Case > should recognize "Mermaid" component type in switch statement
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Switch Statement - Mermaid Case > should NOT treat "mermaid" (lowercase) as valid component type
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Props Mapping > should map "chart" prop correctly to MermaidDiagram
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Props Mapping > should map "id" prop correctly to MermaidDiagram
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Props Mapping > should map "className" prop correctly to MermaidDiagram
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Props Mapping > should pass all three props (chart, id, className) together
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Valid Mermaid Code > should render flowchart diagram
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Valid Mermaid Code > should render sequence diagram
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Valid Mermaid Code > should render class diagram
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Edge Cases > should handle empty chart prop gracefully
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Edge Cases > should handle missing chart prop with fallback
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Edge Cases > should handle chart prop with whitespace
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Edge Cases > should handle invalid Mermaid syntax gracefully
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Edge Cases > should handle chart prop with special characters
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > className Propagation > should pass undefined className if not provided
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > className Propagation > should pass empty string className
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > className Propagation > should pass multiple CSS classes
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Key Generation > should generate key using component ID when provided
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Key Generation > should generate key using index when ID not provided
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Component Integration (Unit Tests) > Key Generation > should generate unique keys for multiple Mermaid components
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Integration Tests (Full Render Path) > JSON Spec → renderComponent → MermaidDiagram > should extract Mermaid component from specification.components
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Integration Tests (Full Render Path) > JSON Spec → renderComponent → MermaidDiagram > should extract Mermaid from direct components array
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Integration Tests (Full Render Path) > JSON Spec → renderComponent → MermaidDiagram > should prioritize specification over components array
DynamicPageRenderer - Mermaid Integration Tests (Full Render Path) > All Mermaid Diagram Types > should render flowchart diagram type
